MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS BURLINGTON COAT FACTORY OF CALIFORNIA, LLC, SALVADOR MARROQUIN'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS. Appearances: Cesar S. Natividad of the Natividad Law Firm (909.217.3264) appearing via Court Call for plaintiff and responding party; John Lee of Ogletree Deakins Nash Smoak & Stewart, (442.4810) for defendants and moving parties. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: denied. The Court's prior ruling on the motion for summary adjudication determined as a matter of law only that no triable issue of material fact existed as to whether plaintiff's termination was based on age discrimination. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

Notice Of Motion For Relief Per Ccp 473, Or In The Alternative, Motion For Judgment On The Pleding Per Ccp 438
Off Calendar Jun-10-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS BURLINGTON COAT FACTORY OF CALIFORNIA, LLC, and, SALVADOR MARROQUIN Motion for Relief Per CCP 473, or in the Alternative, Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings Per CCP 438. Appearances: Cesar S. Natividad, Esq. Attorney at Law, (909) 217-3264 Appearing thru CourtCall for Plaintiff Bolano and opposing party; John G. Lee, Esq. Ogletree Deakins (415) 536-3416 appearing for Defendants and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion denied. The complaint was filed on 5/18/2009. An amendment to the complaint was filed 6/11/2009 substituting the proper name for a Doe. The first amended complaint was properly filed on 7/6/2009 before defendant answered. Defendant filed its answer to the first amended complaint on 9/17/2009. Defendant's failure to read the first amended complaint does not constitute mistake, inadvertence, surprise or excusable neglect warranting relief pursuant to CCP section 473. No good cause shown to continue the Motion for Summary Judgment hearing date or shorten the notice period. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
